title: helichrysum subglomeratum
intro: Helichrysum subglomeratum is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow flowers and ability to thrive in dry, rocky areas. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum subglomeratum lie in its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin care. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Helichrysum subglomeratum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
